top_signals.title: US Sanctions Mexican Companies for Cartel-Linked Fuel Smuggling
top_signals.summary: The US Treasury announced sanctions against two Mexican citizens and nine companies in the country that the agency said are linked to a fuel-smuggling scheme with ties to a cartel.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Anthropic launches AI drug discovery program, joining tech giants in betting on healthcare
top_signals.summary: Anthropic will start an internal drug discovery program, part of a new push to sell artificial intelligence tools to drugmakers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hong Kong's wealth crown reveals China's capital control dilemma
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AeroVironment skyrockets 19% as dronemaker capitalizes on defense spending surge
top_signals.summary: AeroVironment is benefiting from U.S. plans to modernize the U.S. military and secure space.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: MetaMask launches Money Account with stablecoin yield and spending in one wallet
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Agencies release list of distressed or underserved nonmetropolitan middle-income geographies
top_signals.summary: Agencies release list of distressed or underserved nonmetropolitan middle-income geographies

top_signals.title: MetaMask unveils all-in-one Money Account offerings users up to 4% APY on mUSD holdings
top_signals.summary: Consensys tapped Monad as Money Account's “home chain," and will initially use Morpho vaults to generate yield.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Sharplink buys 10,000 ETH, repurchases 2.13 million SBET shares in latest buyback
top_signals.summary: Sharplink bought 10,000 ETH and repurchased 2.13 million SBET shares after completing a $75 million capital raise.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Lessons from the Underground: How to Combat Business Email Compromise
top_signals.summary: Business Email Compromise is more than an email scam. It's a coordinated operation involving compromised accounts, financial research, and cash-out networks. Flare explores how underground forums reveal how BEC attacks are planned and executed. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: An intelligence budget 'super user' job is now in the hands of Russ Vought
top_signals.summary: Russell Vought, director of the White House Office of Management and Budget (OMB), assumed hands-on responsibility for overseeing the spending plans of intelligence agencies following the recent departure of Amaryllis Fox Kennedy, a senior intelligence official who simultaneously served in multiple roles, including one at OMB.
